docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADJ LIMITED, A CALIF. LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT NAUGHTON, CHRISTINA FLORES, LAURA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADJ LIMITED, A CALIF. LIMITED PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-17-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 624 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, CALENDAR OF JAN-27-1998 CASE DISMISSED AS TO DEFENDANT LAURA FLORES ONLY.

M8/#624, COMM S. KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT, SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION TO ENTER JUDGMENT, IF DEFT COMPLIES W/ CONDITIONS, TO BE DISM W/PREJ. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMTENT, RETURN OF PREMISES AT 508 LARKIN ST. #304, RENT AND DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,376.71. DEFT STATES HAS VACATED, PLTF'S CNSL, ARNOLD EVJE, INDICATES DEFT HAS PAID $300 TO MANAGER IN COURT THIS MORNING, AND WILL PAY BALANCE AT $300 PER MONTH BEGINNING 3-15-98 UNTIL PD IN FULL. IF DEFT COMPLIES, PLTF WILL DISM W/ PREJ. IF DEFT FAILS, A JUDGMENT MAY BE ENTERED W/ 24 HOURS NOTICE TO DEFT. PERSONAL PROPERTY DEEMED ABANDONED, CLAIMS WAIVED, GENERAL RELEASE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES, SEC. DEP TO BE APPLIED TOWARD BALANCE. ALL ABOVE AS TO DEFT NAUGHTON. PLAINTIFF WILL DISM W/O PREJ AGAINST DEFT LAURA FLORES.
